Package com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.island

Class AbstractIsland

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.island.AbstractIsland
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, ReadableIsland
Direct Known Subclasses:
Island, UnownedIsland
public abstract class AbstractIsland extends Object implements ReadableIsland, HasClient
